info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Sales Order API
info.description:
Create, read, update, and delete sales orders in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_SALES_ORDER_SRV) supports full CRUD operations on sales order headers, items, partners, pricing elements, schedule lines, billing plans, and text elements. Sales orders are created using deep insert requests that include header and related entity data in a single call.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

request.description: Returns a collection of sales order headers with support for OData query options including $filter, $select, $expand, $top, $skip, $orderby, and $inlinecount. Use $expand to include related items, partners, pricing elements, and other sub-entities.

request.description: Creates a new sales order using a deep insert request. The request body can include header data along with related items, partners, pricing elements, schedule lines, billing plans, and text elements in a single POST operation.
